name: Sales Order Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can optimize your order processing workflows by configuring automated order status transitions, invoice generation, and fulfillment rules that match your specific business operations. These comprehensive order settings help reduce manual order management tasks and enable you to automate key fulfillment stages, improving operational efficiency and reducing order processing time across your B2B operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Properly configured order processing rules typically reduce manual interventions and help ensure orders flow smoothly through pick, pack, and dispatch stages based on payment status and inventory availability. The ability to customize invoice formatting, backorder handling, and customer communication settings enables you to align your Neto platform with established business processes, supporting up to 70% cost reduction through automation of routine order management tasks."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Order Processing Rules"}], "data-id": "order-processing-rules"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The below settings can be found in the "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Order Processing Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Auto invoice new orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "New orders will be invoiced automatically. The date invoiced will use date placed."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default to \u201csignature required\u201d for all orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The signature required field on all shipping consignments will be set to true by default."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automatically approve account customer orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automatically approve orders for customers that choose to put the order \u201con account\u201d at checkout."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shipping cost calculation not required for order created in control panel"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The calculation of shipping cost is not required when adding an order via the control panel. Ideal for service based businesses that do not require shipping."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow order overpayment"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Control panel users will be allowed to overpay orders. Overpayments will become credit on the related customer account."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Auto pick fully paid orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders that are fully paid will automatically go to the \u201cpick\u201d status."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Auto pack fully paid and picked orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders that are fully picked and paid will automatically go to the \u201cpack\u201d status."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Backorder presales products"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products will be placed on backorder if they have an arrival in the future. Some themes also require a PreOrder Qty on the product as well."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Backorder out of stock product for order created in control panel"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders created in the control panel for out of stock items will be put on backorder automatically."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Keep original empty order if all items backordered"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When all items on a paid order are back ordered, the original order with the payment applied will remain in the system as an empty order. The payment from the original order will be used to credit the backorder that is created."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Require new billing address on PayPal Express Checkout"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers are forced to enter a new billing address when checking out with PayPal Express."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Require new shipping address on PayPal Express Checkout"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": dispatch."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hide action buttons on pack order screen"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type":
